channel.title: Scholar on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Scholar on RaihnForge

item.title: Transfer Credits: Foundational Coursework
item.description: These are the foundational lower-division credits Joshua earned prior to enrolling in his degree program at Central Washington University. The block spans fine arts, natural sciences, humanities, social sciences, and general-education electives, and it represents the pre-CWU portion of an academic path that ran from military service through community college and into a four-year university. Source documents for these courses (syllabi, papers, projects, exams) are not retained in the portfolio archive. They predate the digital-archiving habits that anchor the later CWU coursework, and a number of them predate Joshua’s own systematic record keeping for school. Rather than fabricating individual scholar pages without underlying material, the block is consolidated here as a single reference.
